required_preferences.fact: Schedules mentoring sessions and training webinars flexibly, often during evening or weekend blocks to accommodate onboarding requirements — peak customer hours are now occasionally used for live trainings when mandated by company launch timeline

supersedes.fact: Schedules all mentoring sessions with junior reps outside of peak customer hours — never during 8am-4pm support shifts

required_preferences.fact: Hosts weekend brunches at her townhouse exclusively for her mother due to her mother's increased need for daily supervision; brunches with brother are now infrequent and only when he can assist

supersedes.fact: Hosts occasional weekend brunch for her mother and brother — never includes extended family to keep gatherings low-key

required_preferences.fact: Watches short, low-stimulation nature videos for 10 minutes before bed as a wind-down routine to improve sleep quality with CPAP
Checks CPAP machine data every morning and logs usage and mask fit in a dedicated health app — never skips daily review
Completes prescribed wrist exercises at her desk every morning and afternoon — never skips even on weekends
Runs grocery errands only on Fridays after work — never shops on weekends to avoid crowds

persona: A remote customer service representative for a subscription-based software startup
